buttons.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center font-medium transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FE9B7B]/50 disabled:opacity-50 disabled:pointer-events-none rounded-[6px]

forms_and_inputs.base: flex w-full bg-[#0f1923]/50 border border-white/10 text-[#e2e8f0] placeholder:text-[#6b7b8d] focus:outline-none focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#FE9B7B] focus:border-[#FE9B7B] transition-colors rounded-[6px]

tables.container: w-full overflow-hidden rounded-[8px] border border-white/10 bg-[#131a22]/50
tables.header_cell: px-4 py-3 text-left align-middle text-xs font-medium uppercase tracking-wider text-[#6b7b8d]

badges.base: inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-medium transition-colors focus:outline-none

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: We are using .js and .jsx files exclusively. Do NOT create or use .tsx files.

CRITICAL: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, tabs) and key informational elements (stats, balances, headers) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='crm-leads-table'`).
Strictly enforce component consistencies defined in this JSON. Specifically: Ensure all cards use `p-4 md:p-6` to resolve padding irregularities.
Eliminate inconsistent heading sizes by mapping all page titles to the `h1` definition, section titles to `h2`, and widget titles to `h3`.
Apply `backdrop-blur-xl` correctly to all glass surfaces with the exact background color `bg-[#131a22]/85` as defined in the glass card spec.
Ensure table structures follow the specific height (`h-10` header, `h-14` rows) and text alignment specifications provided to unify CRM views.
Apply the Coral accent (`#FE9B7B`) exclusively for primary actions, active states, and key highlights to avoid overwhelming the dark theme.
Harmonize button sizing globally across the app ensuring they default to the `md` (`h-10`) size unless explicitly inside a compact area like a table row (`sm`).
Sidebar tooltips must be present when collapsed. Maintain strict icon sizes (`w-5 h-5`) and proper transition effects.
Use Phosphor icons. If not installed, run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
